use_cases: Displaying time-series data trends over days, weeks, or months with smooth area visualization
Visualizing revenue, user growth, or engagement metrics in dashboards
Comparing multiple data series over time with stacked area charts
Showing cumulative data patterns with gradient-filled areas
Presenting statistical data with customizable axis formatting and theming
ai_summary: A reusable area chart component from the Reaviz library that renders smooth, gradient-filled area visualizations for time-series data. Supports custom color schemes, dark mode, and flexible axis formatting. Designed for dashboard integration across SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce platforms to display metrics trends and comparative data.
